title: LicenseCheck
description: Result of a single moderator document review step within a verification request

id.description: Unique identifier for this check record

request_id.description: FK to verification_requests.id that this check belongs to

document_quality_score.description: OCR/image quality score (0 = unreadable, 1 = perfect). Must be >= 0.7 to proceed.

reviewer_decision.description: Moderator's decision after reviewing the document

reason_code.description: Required when reviewer_decision is 'reject' or 'need_more_info'. Must not be present for 'approve'.

expiration_date.description: Document expiry date (ISO-8601 date, not datetime). Null for non-expiring document classes.

reviewer_id.description: FK to profiles.id of the moderator who performed this review

reviewed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the review was completed

then.description: reason_code is mandatory when the decision is reject or need_more_info
